falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 2.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear technical breakout would invalidate the 'hold' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend contrary to the bottom pattern similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index drops below 18 for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would contradict the 'blowoff score' of 41, indicating market complacency rather than impending correction

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume in the NASDAQ Composite exceeds 200% of its 90-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormally high volume would invalidate the 'unknown' verdict by demonstrating extreme market participation inconsistent with a holding pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
